name: wifi-honey
title: wifi-honey
summary:
Wi-Fi honeypot
In the case of WPA/WPA2, by running airodump-ng along side
this you also end up capturing the first two packets of
the four way handshake and so can attempt to crack the key
with either aircrack-ng or coWPAtty.
.
What this script does is to automate the setup process, it
creates five monitor mode interfaces, four are used as APs
and the fifth is used for airodump-ng. To make things
easier, rather than having five windows all this is done in

description:
Wi-Fi honeypot
In the case of WPA/WPA2, by running airodump-ng along side
this you also end up capturing the first two packets of
the four way handshake and so can attempt to crack the key
with either aircrack-ng or coWPAtty.
.
What this script does is to automate the setup process, it
creates five monitor mode interfaces, four are used as APs
and the fifth is used for airodump-ng. To make things
easier, rather than having five windows all this is done in
a screen session which allows you to switch between screens
to see what is going on. All sessions are labelled so you
know which is which.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use wifi-honey as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wifi-honey [options] [args]` as documented upstream for wifi-honey.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wifi-honey with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wifi-honey --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme:
Wi-Fi honeypot
In the case of WPA/WPA2, by running airodump-ng along side
this you also end up capturing the first two packets of
the four way handshake and so can attempt to crack the key
with either aircrack-ng or coWPAtty.
.
What this script does is to automate the setup process, it
creates five monitor mode interfaces, four are used as APs
and the fifth is used for airodump-ng. To make things
easier, rather than having five windows all this is done in
a screen session which allows you to switch between screens
to see what is going on. All sessions are labelled so you
know which is which.
